function_v0.doc: Query balance for a single address (helper function)
function_v0.name: check_balance

function_v0.doc:
Query USDC balances for multiple addresses

# Arguments
* `usdc_token` - USDC token contract address
* `addresses` - Array of addresses to check (max 100)

# Returns
Array of balances in the same order as input addresses
function_v0.name: check_balances
